name: mindfullens-film-lab
description: MindfulLens Film Lab — aplikacja web (Vite, React): symulacja klisz w przeglądarce.

scripts.raw:reference:gate: npm run raw:manifest:build && npm run test:raw-reference
scripts.raw:release:check: npm run raw:reference:gate && npm run test:regression && npm run build
scripts.test:local-mask-p1: npm run test:range-mask && npm run test:luma-sobel-sample
scripts.test:types: npm run test:engine-types-barrel && npm run test:engine-index-types-snapshot && npm run test:engine-types-usage-tsc && npm run test:type-safety-policy-doc
scripts.test:proxy: npm run test:proxy-webgpu && npm run test:proxy-downscale && npm run test:proxy-tiles
scripts.test: npm run test:types && npm run test:regression && npm run test:recipe-envelope && npm run test:recipe-import && npm run test:recipe-warning-ui && npm run test:i18n-parity && npm run test:film-lab-export-gates && npm run test:crop-geometry && npm run test:deep-audit && npm run test:gh-pages-base && npm run test:static-deploy-assets && npm run test:env-example-parity && npm run test:proxy && npm run test:e2e-pointer && npm run test:fast-preview-webgl2 && npm run test:runtime-env && npm run test:runtime-tier && npm run test:catalog-dam && npm run test:mask-binding && npm run test:onnx-adapter && npm run test:local-mask-p1 && npm run test:depth-proxy-digest && npm run test:depth-onnx-inference && npm run test:cmyk-soft-proof && npm run test:phase-c-passes && npm run test:recipe-layer-blend && npm run test:vite-toolchain
scripts.ci: node scripts/check-filmstrip-react-window-import.mjs && npm run lint && npm run test:types && npm run test:regression && npm run test:recipe-envelope && npm run test:recipe-import && npm run test:recipe-warning-ui && npm run test:i18n-parity && npm run test:film-lab-export-gates && npm run test:crop-geometry && npm run test:deep-audit && npm run test:gh-pages-base && npm run test:static-deploy-assets && npm run test:env-example-parity && npm run test:proxy && npm run test:e2e-pointer && npm run test:fast-preview-webgl2 && npm run test:runtime-env && npm run test:runtime-tier && npm run test:catalog-dam && npm run test:mask-binding && npm run test:onnx-adapter && npm run test:local-mask-p1 && npm run test:depth-proxy-digest && npm run test:depth-onnx-inference && npm run test:cmyk-soft-proof && npm run test:phase-c-passes && npm run test:recipe-layer-blend && npm run test:retouch-pass && npm run test:film-lab-ui-mode && npm run test:adaptive-preset-v1 && npm run test:vite-toolchain && npm run test:raw-reference && npm run build && npm run audit
scripts.ci:smoke: npm run ci && npm run profiles:verify-source
scripts.preflight: npm run lint && npm run test:types && npm run test:export-manifest-depth-compat-api-doc && npm run test:type-safety-cross-doc-link
